heading: Air National Guard: when a component of the Air Force
label: 10112 Air National Guard: when a component of the Air Force
text: The Air National Guard while in the service of the United States is a component of the Air Force.
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in , prior to repeal by .section 8078 of this titlePub. L. 103–337, § 1661(a)(3)(A)
Effective DateSection effective , except as otherwise provided, see , set out as a note under .Dec. 1, 1994section 1691 of Pub. L. 103–337section 10001 of this title
